Appearances:
Plaintiff SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY, is present. Represented by RENEE SCOTT
Attorney, TONY RUCH, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, TAHRIO MARSHALL, is present.
Attorney,AARON FARMER , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem DAVID BRILLANT, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-24-2010 is vacated.
